_meta.name: un_locode_sample
_meta.title: UN/LOCODE — United Nations Code for Trade and Transport Locations (sample)
_meta.source: UNECE UN/LOCODE (documented sample of major ports/airports/cities)
_meta.disclaimer: A small documented sample of UN/LOCODE 5-character location codes for validation and examples. It is NOT the full UN/LOCODE list (which has tens of thousands of entries); absence from this sample does not mean a code is invalid.
